series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains all documentation related to the administrative review of state-owned patrol car crashes. Contains HP-3C, repairs/damage estimates, supervisor reviews, vehicle details, template 12, OH-3, and other relevant crash information involving patrol cars. All documentation shall be stored in the Employee Incident Reporting (EIR) database

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Scan all paper documents into EIR and ; Electronic: two (2) years current
